# nayatel_networks (Data Source)

List available networks.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nayatel_networks" "available" {}

output "network_ids" {
  value = data.nayatel_networks.available.networks[*].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `networks` (Attributes List) List of networks (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--networks))

<a id="nestedatt--networks"></a>
### Nested Schema for `networks`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `status` (String)
